session.title: Workspace and README Documentation Update
session.description: Updated VS Code workspace file and README.md to reflect the complete license system and agent deployment infrastructure

commits.message: docs: Update workspace and README with license system documentation

updates: Added 7 organized workspace folders with emoji labels
Root folder: 🏠 Hedge Edge (Root)
App folder: 📱 Desktop App (Electron + React)
Agents folder: 🤖 Trading Agents (MT4/MT5/cTrader)
Backend folder: ⚙️ Backend API (Python/FastAPI)
Testing folder: 🧪 Testing Suite
Tasks folder: 📋 Task Management
Scripts folder: 🔧 Build Scripts
Added launch configurations for Electron, License API, and QA tests
Added VS Code tasks for development workflows
Added extension recommendations (ESLint, Prettier, Python, Tailwind)
Updated title to include MT4, MT5, and cTrader support
Added License Management feature
Added Real-Time Agent Communication feature
Expanded project structure with all new components
Added License System section with architecture diagram
Added License API Endpoints table
Added Platform Communication table (ZeroMQ, File IPC, Named Pipes)
Updated Quick Start with License API server step
Updated Architecture diagram with all communication bridges
Expanded Tech Stack table with all technologies
Added Testing section with integration test suite info
Updated Troubleshooting with license-related issues

folders.name: 📱 Desktop App (Electron + React)

folders.name: ⚙️ Backend API (Python/FastAPI)

readme_new_sections.content: Architecture diagram showing validation flow between MT4/MT5/cTrader and Electron
Table showing ZeroMQ (MT5), File IPC (MT4), Named Pipes (cTrader)
Integration test suite with 5 test suites and instructions
